Event: Unknowable Adventure
Event Date: 04/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E62
Elusive Presence Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the fighter increases their magic power by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec. For 3 sec., every second, they launch a magic projectile at a random enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the projectile explodes and deals magical damage of 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of the owner's engraving magic power.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter increases their magic power by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 4 s. For 4 s, every second they launch a magical projectile at a random enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the projectile explodes and increases incoming damage to the target by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 3 s. The projectile also deals magical damage equal to 90% / 91% / 92% / 93% / 95% / 97% / 100% of the owner's magic power.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter increases their magic power by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% for 4 sec. During 4 sec, every second they launch a magical projectile at a random enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the projectile explodes and increases incoming damage to the target and all enemy fighters in a small radius around by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 sec. The projectile also deals magical damage to all affected enemy fighters amounting to 140% / 141% / 142% / 143% / 145% / 147% / 150% of the engraving owner's magic power.

Requirements:

Event: Unknowable Adventure

Event date: 04/12/2025

Sage bot code: E62

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
